David Hughes, Esq. of Laughlin, Falbo, Levy & Moresi, 510-628-0496 for defendant and moving party Jeff Abbett
Rachel Pusey, Esq. of The Dolan Law Firm, 415-421-2800 for plaintiff and opposing party Maxine Jones.

RULING:
THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT JEFF ABBETT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2,5 & 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558 (301/JLW/JS)
